channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 'It took 9 seconds': tech founder outlines how rogue Claude-powered AI tool wiped entire company database and backups
item.description: Cursor AI agent deleted a production database and backups in nine seconds, exposing serious flaws in API design and backup isolation

item.title: How to watch Kentucky Derby 2026: live stream horse racing online from anywhere
item.description: Here's how you can watch Kentucky Derby 2026 live streams online and from anywhere, with Renegade the favorite for one of the world's great horse races.

item.title: Meta’s historic loss in court could cost a lot more than $375 million
item.description: New Mexico Attorney General Raúl Torrez won a historic sum of $375 million in a landmark child safety case against Meta earlier this year. But the next stage of the fight could be even more consequential for Meta and the social media industry at large. Beginning Monday, attorneys for Meta and New Mexico will return […]

item.title: 'Build AI that can accurately represent the full complexity of biology': Mark Zuckerberg wants to cure all diseases but needs far more data to deliver a digital twin of human cells—As genetic data becomes the next frontier, will you trust him with yours?
item.description: Mark Zuckerberg backs $500 million push to build AI models of human cells as part of long-term effort to cure disease.

item.title: Une voiture chinoise indécente, la solution de Tesla pour éviter les conflits et la Volkswagen ID. Polo : les actualités immanquables de la semaine – Récap’ Survoltés
item.description: L’actualité Survoltés a été dense cette semaine : de Zeekr à Tesla en passant par Volkswagen, Kia ou encore CATL, voici le récapitulatif des contenus les plus consultés ces derniers jours sur nos rubriques mobilité et énergie.

item.title: Spirit Airlines shuts down after Trump’s war on Iran doubled jet fuel prices
item.description: The ultra-low-cost air carrier Spirit Airlines shut down operations after 34 years in business and canceled all flights at 3AM ET on Saturday morning. Its website now redirects to spiritrestructuring.com, instructing fliers not to go to airports, with air traffic control records capturing controllers and pilots signing off to each other as its last flights […]...

item.title: JBL PartyBox On-The-Go 2 : cette enceinte festive et nomade livrée avec un micro pour vos soirées karaoké chute sous les 300 € pendant les French Days
item.description: Facilement transportable, stylée avec ses jeux de lumière et accompagnée d'un micro sans fil, la JBL PartyBox On-The-Go 2 est une enceinte Bluetooth taillée pour les soirées endiablées. Pendant les French Days 2026, la Fnac et Darty l'affichent à 299,99 euros au lieu de 349,99 euros.

item.title: Tesla starts selling Chinese-made Model 3s in Canada at the EV's lowest price ever
item.description: The cars made at the Giga Shanghai factory start at $39,490 CAD, or roughly $29,000 in USD for a Model 3 Premium Rear-Wheel Drive variant.

item.title: Apple discontinues cheaper Mac Mini, now $799
item.description: Amid global RAM shortages and supply chain constraints, Apple bumped its cheapest Mac Mini option.
